assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states '24-month support window (vs. 14 months on Regular/Stable)' in the benefits section

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Additional cost — Extended support incurs extra charges (contact GCS for pricing)' and has a dedicated cost considerations section

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: Response states 'Same version availability as Regular — no delay in accessing new features' indicating Extended gets same versions as Regular

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'teams may drift behind and accumulate upgrade debt' and warns about missing new features through delayed upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Response provides the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --zone ZONE --release-channel extended'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response includes pre-migration validation with 'Verify 1.31+ (Extended requires 1.27+)' and confirms 'Your 1.31 version is compatible'

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Compliance-friendly — better for environments with slow change approval processes' and mentions compliance benefits

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: Response states 'End of Support enforcement — still applies, but you have 24 months instead of 14' and emphasizes upgrades are still required before EoS

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: Response clearly explains 'Manual minor version upgrades required — unlike Regular channel, minor version upgrades are NOT automated on Extended (except at End of Support)' and emphasizes manual planning throughout
